summary: Independent read-only QA review accepts M4-CAMPAIGN-AI-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT-R4. Current HEAD 35e63a06703107ad375a26928fcd9e7188abcdca is clean; business code commit 5e6d04557f33 implements the R4 bounded trace fix. Required focused, package, deterministic, full test, check, task, handoff, whitespace, scope, and boundary evidence passed. No P0/P1 correctness, determinism, authoritative mutation, command/query parity, forbidden-path, or scope-creep issue was found.

tests_run.result: Current HEAD is clean on feat/m4-campaign-ai after process route commit 35e63a06 advanced during review.
Diff is confined to allowed task scope: packages/protocol, packages/sim-core, tests, project task/model/goal/thread/message/route files.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- apps/web apps/desktop packages/client-core packages/map-renderer packages/ui packages/platform packages/save-format packages/content-schema packages/content-runtime content-source tools .github docs PROJECT_STATUS.md MANIFEST.md SHA256SUMS.txt VALIDATION_REPORT.md

tests_run.result: No random/time API, hidden runtime.world access, or command/event tail access found in the AI planner.
No forbidden React/Pixi/Electron/Node fs imports or references found.
Focused regression gate passed: 2 test files, 18 tests.
Sim-core package tests passed: 22 files, 165 tests.
Protocol package tests passed: 1 file, 9 tests.
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest passed 33 files / 233 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file / 3 tests.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.
Bare taskctl command is not available in this shell PATH; reviewed with repository taskctl script instead.

decisions: ACCEPT. R4 fixed the prior bounded trace blocker: packages/protocol/src/index.ts exports M4_CAMPAIGN_AI_TRACE_MAX_CANDIDATES = 16, the protocol parser rejects larger candidate arrays, and packages/sim-core/src/campaign-ai-v1.ts clamps planner output to the same constant.

ACCEPT. Truncated traces retain selectedCandidateId and emit deterministic candidateId-sorted entries; tests/sim-core-m4-campaign-ai.test.ts includes an oversize maxTraceCandidates 99 regression that selects withdraw, retains the selected candidate, stays within protocol max, and parses successfully.

ACCEPT. The AI planner consumes querySimulationV1 read models and returns null or existing GameCommandV1 payloads. It does not directly mutate authoritative WorldState, touch runtime.world, or introduce an AI-only command surface.

ACCEPT. Scenario coverage exercises supply/season wait, objective change, reinforcement, withdrawal, cancellation, siege continuation, no-action determinism/serialization, start-march command parity, and trace bounds.

ACCEPT. Branch diff does not touch forbidden UI, desktop, save-format, content, docs, CI, or product-status paths; no full diplomacy AI, multi-year grand strategy, personality simulation, telemetry, server/multiplayer, manual battle, complex naval warfare, or M5 content was added.
risks: Residual R3 risk is normal for campaign AI over command/query contracts and should be handled by lead integration gates.

AI-specific postwar-risk behavior is code-reviewed through buildPostwarRiskCandidate and the sim.list-m4-war-outcomes / sim.compare-m3-postwar-governance-outcomes query surface; there is no dedicated postwar-risk scenario in tests/sim-core-m4-campaign-ai.test.ts, but upstream M4 war-outcome and M3 postwar query tests cover the read models. This is non-blocking and not a P0/P1 issue.
The planner is intentionally shallow and single-turn; richer strategy remains out of scope for this task.
requested_action: lead_orchestrator may proceed with task acceptance/integration for M4-CAMPAIGN-AI-001. Do not route back to simulation_engineer unless lead wants additional non-blocking postwar-risk scenario coverage.
